scope.target: Legacy decision inventory and landing-bucket classification
scope.dependency_radius: Legacy decision source set plus current canonical target docs referenced by the decision index
constraints: Do not reclassify project-specific truth into .ai
Assign one primary landing target per decision family
Mark multi-bucket decision families explicitly instead of forcing a false single-category mapping

inputs.architecture_target: Turn legacy decision records into stable .ai/.dev canonical sources and reduce legacy records to governance/history only

steps: Reviewed the current decision index and sampled representative legacy record content
Mapped each decision family to bucket A/B/C/D and a primary landing target
Recorded early normalization findings for Stage 2
validation: Every currently visible decision family appears in the inventory table
Each decision family has a bucket and a primary landing target
Multi-bucket decision families are explicitly called out for split handling
deferred_items: Normalize landing zones for guide-vs-standard overlaps
Migrate content and retire duplicate legacy records

results.summary: Completed Stage 1 inventory and target bucketing for the current legacy decision set.
